task: Fix codemie-code CLI on Windows when user profile path contains special characters (e.g. parentheses) by properly quoting the command path before spawning the subprocess.

key_reasoning.reason: Spans Core (BaseAgentAdapter.ts) and Utils (exec.ts) across 2 architectural layers. exec.ts is the foundational spawn utility consumed by virtually every process-spawning path in the codebase — red flag for touching core shared utilities applied, bumping from M to L.

Two production files modified (BaseAgentAdapter.ts primary fix ~3-5 lines, exec.ts secondary fix ~5 lines), two existing test files updated (BaseAgentAdapter.test.ts, processes.test.ts), and one new test file created (exec.test.ts). Approximately 4-5 modified files and 1 new file across src/agents/core/ and src/utils/.

red_flags_applied: Component Scope bumped from M (3) to L (4): exec.ts is the foundational spawn utility used by virtually every process-spawning code path in the codebase — qualifies as a core shared utility.
